summary: Lean-mode adversarial review: zero BLOCKER findings. Six non-blocking findings recorded — three MAJOR (pipeline signature drift from REQ-014, dead-code call to validateAndTransitionVault whose return value is discarded, fast-check generators for success/statDir-failure success-path properties feed unused arbitraries which downgrades them to repeated example tests) and three MINOR (filename drift from architecture, unused _now parameter in pure helper, missing path-field assertions at the pipeline level). All five dimensions PASS under lean rules; per-FIND-001..FIND-009 carry-forward resolutions are honored by the implementation.
